response.overview: "Buffer Zone" (2025) is an 18-minute short film by Lebanese-American writer, artist, and filmmaker Farrah Berrou. It is a part-documentary, part-memoir film that chronicles her return to her ancestral border village of Kfarkila in Southern Lebanon, marking her first visit since October 8, 2023, following the November 2024 ceasefire.
response.tagline: Part-documentary, part-memoir film that chronicles her return to her ancestral border village of Kfarkila in Southern Lebanon, marking her first visit since October 8, 2023, following the November 2024 ceasefire.
response.title: Buffer Zone
